title: 30 Pcs Pink Paper Plates 9 Inch Disposable Scalloped Party Paper Plates Light Pink Dessert Plate for Birthday Baby Shower Wedding
features: Pink Paper Plates Set: Package includes 30 x 9 inch light pink plates, enough quanities for using in multi-person gatherings
Cute Scalloped Edges Design: The edges of pink disposable plates are designed with scalloped pattern, which highlights cute and elegance of plates, which can set off the party atmosphere
Pink Party Plates Material: Pink dessert plates are made of thick paper,and surface is coated to be waterproof and oil-proof.Do not put in microwave

Wide Application: Pink paper plates are suitable for various parties, such as birthday, baby showers, bridal showers, weddings, graduation ceremonies and other parties. They can also be used for daily family dinners and picnics
Saving Cleaning Time: Pink paper plates can be thrown away directly after use, not cleanup required, you can have more time to enjoy the party with friends or families
